proof:
have h : I ◁ I = I := I.call I
      exact h
failed_attempts:
-- Using the property of the identity bird that I ◁ x = x for any bird x.
    -- Here, x is I itself.
    have h₁ : I ◁ I = I := I.call I
    exact h₁
  -- Since we have I ◁ I = I, we can directly use this to conclude the proof.
  exact h

have h : I ◁ I = I := I.call I
      rw [show I is egocentric by rfl]
      exact h
  end DefendingTheIdentityBird

have h : I ◁ I = I := by
        apply I.call
      -- Use the fact that I ◁ I = I to conclude the proof
      simpa [show (I is egocentric) ↔ I ◁ I = I by rfl] using h
  end DefendingTheIdentityBird

-- Use the property of the identity bird to show that I ◁ I = I.
    have h₁ : (I ◁ I) = I := by
      -- The identity bird I, when called with its own name, responds with itself.
      have h₂ : ∀ x : Bird, (I ◁ x) = x := I.call
      -- Apply the property to x = I.
      have h₃ : (I ◁ I) = I := h₂ I
      exact h₃
    exact h₁
  -- Since I ◁ I = I, we conclude that I is egocentric.
  exact h

have h₁ : ∀ x : Bird, (I ◁ x) = x := I.call
    have h₂ : (I ◁ I) = I := h₁ I
    exact h₂
  simpa [is_egocentric] using h

have h : I ◁ I = I := by
        apply I.call
      exact h
  end DefendingTheIdentityBird

have h : I ◁ I = I := by
        apply I.call
      -- Since I ◁ I = I, it follows that I is egocentric.
      simpa [egocentric] using h

have h₁ : ∀ x : Bird, (I ◁ x) = x := I.call
    have h₂ : (I ◁ I) = I := h₁ I
    exact h₂
  
  simpa [is_egocentric] using h

have h₁ : I ◁ I = I := by
      apply I.call
    exact h₁
  
  exact h

have h₁ : I ◁ I = I := by
      apply I.call
    exact h₁
  simpa using h

have h₁ : ∀ x : Bird, (I ◁ x) = x := I.call
    have h₂ : (I ◁ I) = I := by
      simpa [h₁] using h₁ I
    exact h₂
  simpa [h] using h
successful_attempts:
have h : I ◁ I = I := I.call I
      exact h

have h : I ◁ I = I := I.call I
      simpa [h] using h

have h := I.call I
      simp [h]
      <;> rfl

have h : I ◁ I = I := by
        have h₁ : I ◁ I = I := I.call I
        exact h₁
      trivial

have h : I ◁ I = I := by
        have h₁ : I ◁ I = I := by
          apply I.call
        exact h₁
      simpa using h
